text: The sterile quiet of the corridor fills me with a sense of anticipation and slight apprehension. The cold fluorescent light reflecting on the glass, coupled with the unyielding lines of architecture, makes me feel like an outsider peering into a space not meant for me. Yet, stepping into the second scene, colors and words emerge, and I am invited into a world of ideas and curiosity. The wall entices me to think about the relationship between research, innovation, and humanity. Despite the dimness, there is warmth in the invitation to contemplate and connect. I feel a mixture of cautious wonder and quiet excitement—both distant from comfort, yet close to insight.
